A '''sound sponge''' was an electronic device that emitted sonic waves in frequencies well above and below the normal range of audible sound for most species in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was well suited when someone didn't want any noise to raise an alarm. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used one to keep the subdued [[Bria Tharen]] on the [[Queen of Empire|Queen of the Empire]] from being heard when she cried out for help.

{{Tech-stub}}
